title: Xu ly thong tin nghe si lien quan den ma tuy tren truyen thong
content: Bai viet phan tich cach cac trang tin dua tin ve vu viec nghe si lien quan den ma tuy. Diem can luu y la phai phan biet thong tin da duoc co quan chuc nang xac nhan voi tin don. Trong bai tap, file nay giup corpus news co them tu khoa nghe si, ma tuy, chat cam, citation va source. Phan bo sung cho kich thuoc: khi tao golden dataset, nhom co the tao cau hoi ve viec chatbot co dua ra canh bao khong du evidence hay khong, co trich dan dung source hay khong, va retrieval co lay dung context tin tuc hay khong.
